name: apna-decoration
description: Complete E-Commerce Platform for Home Decoration and Furniture

scripts.setup:all: npm run setup:user && npm run setup:admin && npm run setup:vendor && npm run setup:delivery
scripts.setup:user: cd User && npm install && cd backend && npm install
scripts.setup:admin: cd Admin && npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:vendor: cd Vendor && npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:delivery: cd Delivery && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run start:user-backend" "npm run start:admin-backend" "npm run start:user-frontend" "npm run start:admin-frontend" "npm run start:vendor-frontend" "npm run start:delivery-frontend"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin && npm run build:vendor && npm run build:delivery
scripts.test:all: npm run test:user && npm run test:admin && npm run test:vendor
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build:all && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production
scripts.build:apk: cd User && npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:user && npm run lint:admin && npm run lint:vendor
scripts.clean:all: npm run clean:user && npm run clean:admin && npm run clean:vendor && npm run clean:delivery
scripts.clean:user: cd User && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf backend/node_modules && npm run setup:user
scripts.clean:admin: cd Admin && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf backend/node_modules && rm -rf frontend/node_modules && npm run setup:admin
scripts.clean:vendor: cd Vendor && rm -rf node_modules && rm -rf frontend/node_modules && npm run setup:vendor
scripts.clean:delivery: cd Delivery && rm -rf frontend/node_modules && npm run setup:delivery

author: APNA DECORATION Team
